title: Senior Fleet Manager at Myntra Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Myntra Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Myntra Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Myntra Logistics:
Myntra Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra Logistics!
